metadata.description: A person in their 50s-60s with feminine presentation has fair skin with some fine lines around the eyes and mouth. Their face is oval-shaped with a defined jawline. The hair is predominantly gray with some lighter strands, pulled back into a neat bun, revealing a slightly receding hairline at the temples. The eyes are almond-shaped and green, set moderately apart. Eyebrows are medium thickness and gently arched. The nose has a straight bridge and a rounded tip. The mouth features medium-thick lips, upturned in a gentle smile, revealing upper teeth. The person has a light skin tone with hints of pink. They are smiling warmly, with their head slightly tilted to the left.
metadata.anchor: Smiling person with green eyes and gray hair in a bun.
